mapper.sql: e.id, e.name, e.category, e.serial_number, e.status, e.dormitory_id, d.name AS dormitory_name, d.deleted_at AS dormitory_deleted_at, e.room_id, rm.name AS room_name, e.checkin_id, e.attributes, e.version, e.created_at, e.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM equipment e LEFT JOIN dormitories d ON d.id = e.dormitory_id LEFT JOIN rooms rm ON rm.id = e.room_id AND rm.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE e.id = #{id} AND e.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id, name, category, serial_number, status, dormitory_id, checkin_id, room_id, attributes, version, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM equipment WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE equipment SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE equipment SET dormitory_id = #{targetDormitoryId}, room_id = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE equipment SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
